meta.name: viewport
meta.title: EgoStrap Features — Roblox Client Tuning & Customization

div.p: Explore the detailed features that make EgoStrap the leading client customizer for power users.

Unlike tools that inject dynamic link libraries (DLLs) or hook direct memory calls, EgoStrap interfaces only with legal bootstrapper parameters, local file modifications, and registry-level Roblox configs. It operates completely side-by-side with Roblox and is 100% compliant with anticheat guidelines.

Tired of the rigid 60 frames-per-second lock? Overlap graphics settings to target high refresh rates. Configured to align with variables in the client engine, allowing you to maximize GPU utilization on top-tier screens.

Organize overlays, custom death sounds, custom crosshairs, cursor icons, and map textures. Simply drop files in the mods folder. EgoStrap resolves asset priority paths and points Roblox directly to your assets.

Switch between alternate accounts effortlessly. Save encrypted profiles on your local disk and swap sessions with a single button click. Say goodbye to signing out of the browser and re-entering 2FA codes.

Track network nodes and target faster connection hubs. Set matchmaking filters to prioritize servers in regions closer to your actual location, resulting in lower latency, fewer lag spikes, and better connection stability.

Modify deep Roblox engine parameters directly. Toggle experimental graphics APIs (Vulkan, Direct3D 11/12), adjust lighting algorithms (Phase 3 Shadowmap overrides), tune network update frequencies, and adjust render distances.
Test real sound synthesis modifications and client UI color theme overrides directly in this web sandbox.

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(128,128,128,0.2); padding-bottom: 6px;

div.p: Client connected. Waiting for patch triggers...
